description: Composition Sleeveless round neck dress made of 100% polyester, has pin tucks at the neck and waist, a belt at the back and print Fit Regular Wash care Wash with warm water Do not bleach Use cool iron, do not iron on print arrow woman caters to fashionistas with a taste for the exotic. This dress with its color-happy, mood lifting hues is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with a bolero jacket, a vibrant scarf and sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
